protocol.type: runner-registered pure probe; Layer-0 fixed-formula gate; no training; no learned weights
protocol.label_boundary: labels diagnostic-only for AUC/AP and oracle top-K boundary categories; labels are not used for fitting, thresholding, early stopping, or formula parameter updates
protocol.parameter_boundary: grid parameters are predeclared mechanism scans; the leaderboard is diagnostic, not a deployable hyperparameter-selection claim
protocol.critical_fix: force data_split_seed=seed and run seeds sequentially to avoid global random.shuffle cross-thread drift

variant_summaries.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.

rows.topk_protocol: K equals number of test anomalies; labels diagnostic-only for oracle categories and layer-0 scoring evaluation
